What's up guys? Chris here. I am really, really excited for this new thing that we are just doing. Now, a couple things why we're changing the model, what we're doing, because I think it's important to tell you. First thing is that I'm finding out that a lot of people are actually like putting a lot of emphasis on the fitness when they're trying to lose weight. And so when they don't get the workouts or the times aren't necessarily convenient for them, they just give up in general. Okay, so what we're going to do now is provide you a customized workout so you can do it anytime. So you don't have to be coming in at five o'clock in the morning if it's better for you to do it at night. Like eight when we don't have session times, which is great. Okay, the next thing is I find that a lot of people aren't tracking their food. And to be really honest with you, like 10% of the equation is the fitness. 90% of it is nutrition. So if you do not eat right, regardless of your goals to lose weight, to gain muscle, to gain size, to be an Olympic athlete, to do Spartan races at a high level, you will not hit your goal. And so what we're going to do for you is give you custom nutrition programming, okay, designed just for you, not for me for you. Okay, and then lastly, I'm realizing that a lot of people are not getting the attention that they need. And because in a group setting, it's hard to do that. Right?
